# mypackage/__init__.py
from mypackage.auth.client import AuthClient
from mypackage.http.client import HTTPClient
from mypackage.db.client import DatabaseClient

# mypackage/auth/client.py
class AuthClient:
    def authenticate(self, token: str) -> bool:
        return len(token) > 0

# mypackage/http/client.py
class HTTPClient:
    def __init__(self, base_url: str):
        self.base_url = base_url

    def get(self, path: str) -> dict:
        return {}

# mypackage/db/client.py
class DatabaseClient:
    def __init__(self, dsn: str):
        self.dsn = dsn

    def query(self, sql: str) -> list:
        return []
